---
title: Living Without Cloud Services
author: GridFree
date: 2024-02-26
description: A practical guide to self-sovereign computing
tags: ["#selfhosting", "#independence"]
---
A practical guide to self-sovereign computing. You do not need AWS, Google, or Azure to run your digital life.

**Start with these:**
- Home NAS for file storage
- Self-hosted email with Postfix
- Local-first applications for daily work
